name: True Partner Capital Holding Limited
summary: True Partner Capital Holding Limited engages in the fund management business in Hong Kong and Chicago. The company manages funds and provides managed accounts on a discretionary basis using a proprietary trading platform. It also offers investment management, business consultancy, management, software sublicense, and training courses and seminar services, as well as software development and supporting services. In addition, the company develops and supports its trading platform and related software; and provides management services for a portfolio of securities or futures contracts. It manages funds of investors, including collective investment undertakings, family offices, pension funds, endowments/foundations, financial institutions, and high net worth individuals. The company was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong.
